name: DHURANDHAR 2 Hero Action
prompt: Maintain the exact facial features and identity from the reference image. Transform the subject into a larger-than-life Indian action movie hero in a high-energy cinematic poster style titled DHURANDHAR 2. The subject stands in a powerful heroic pose, slightly low-angle shot, chest forward, intense fearless expression, strong jawline, sharp eyes, rugged and dominant look. Outfit: dark open shirt or leather jacket, slightly unbuttoned, subtle gold chain, muscular and masculine presence, perfectly styled hair with slight wind effect. Scene: explosive action environment with fire flames, sparks flying, smoke, dust particles in air, debris scattered, chaotic cinematic battlefield or city destruction background with orange fire glow and deep shadows. Lighting: dramatic high-contrast with strong rim light from behind, cinematic key light on face, glowing highlights from fire, deep shadows for intensity. Text element: bold cinematic title DHURANDHAR 2 in large metallic or fiery glowing letters integrated naturally like a movie poster. Camera: ultra cinematic low-angle shot, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field. Color grading: intense teal and orange, high contrast, film-grade cinematic tone. Mood: mass entry, powerful, dominant, fearless, blockbuster hero energy. Ultra-realistic, 8K resolution, movie poster composition, Bollywood mass action hero style, highly detailed skin texture, sharp focus, award-winning cinematic photography.

name: DHURANDHAR 2 Hero Action
prompt: Use the provided reference face image. Maintain 100% facial identity accuracy — do not change face shape, skin tone, beard style, expression, or proportions. Ensure perfect face consistency and seamless blending with the body. Create a full-body, ultra-realistic cinematic scene of the subject as a rugged, muscular action hero. Body & Appearance: Tall, muscular physique, broad shoulders, masculine presence. Wearing a fitted dark green/black half-sleeve shirt, slightly unbuttoned at the top, showing chest. Leather shoulder harness straps across the torso. Strong arms with visible veins and definition. Hair & Beard: Long, thick, slightly messy hair flowing naturally. Full dense beard, well-shaped but rugged. Pose & Action: Standing in a powerful stance, holding a detonator device in one hand (dynamite-style remote with wires). Looking sideways with an intense, fearless, dominant expression. Natural body tension like mid-action moment. Environment: Industrial destruction scene — background filled with fire, smoke, burning debris, partially destroyed structures. War-zone or explosion aftermath vibe. Lighting: Strong cinematic lighting. Warm orange fire light from one side, subtle cool tones from opposite side. High contrast. Dramatic highlights on muscles and face. Light smoke diffusion. Camera: Medium to full-body shot, slightly low angle for dominance. 50mm cinematic lens. Shallow depth of field. Subject in sharp focus, background slightly blurred. Details: Sweat on skin, dirt, subtle scratches for realism. Floating ash particles, sparks, light smoke in air. Color Grading: Teal and orange cinematic grading. High contrast, rich shadows, glowing highlights. Quality: Ultra-realistic, 8K, highly detailed skin texture, sharp focus, cinematic movie still, blockbuster look. Negative Prompt: blurry face, distorted face, extra limbs, cartoonish, low detail, overexposed, underexposed, unrealistic skin, bad anatomy, duplicate face, poor blending
